pr.title: [10min_16mb] 0.9641 BPB: LeakyReLU² + Score-First TTT + N-gram Backoff Cache

output.summary: 11L LeakyReLU² GQA transformer with gated attention, Score-first TTT, Laplace-smoothed n-gram backoff cache, and int6 quantization.
techniques: LeakyReLU² gated XSA-5 stack with value residuals and VE on top layers
Score-first legal TTT paired with entropy-adaptive Laplace-smoothed n-gram backoff cache
Int6 per-row quantization on Muon/Adam training with CROWN-Q late penalty
